description: miss sixty's Elixir for women is an oriental fragrance that comes in a whimsical flacon inspired by a beaker. Top notes are amalfi lemon, peach and granny smith, apstar anise and grapefruit middle notes are gently spicy and base notes are vanilla and sandalwood.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
